credentials: PHD 2014 Univ of Maryland College Park
name: LINDSAY JACOBY

ratings.comment: She gives out way more work than the other professors for this class. I had to write 15 pages for an intro college English class while other professors had their students write 2-3 pages for. Overall, a nice person just gives our wayyy too much work.
One of my least favorite professors I've had so far. Boring, hard grader, way too much homework, just overall bad wouldn't recommend.

Do not take this class with her. Way too much homework for such an unimportant course, I have never had my time wasted like I have with this class in my life. It was honestly ridiculous that I spent more time on her class than I did my core classes, she is insufferable.

Too much homework, felt like busy work all the time. She came up with a class theme which was "contested places" the class had to write about the same topic for the semester. She started year by saying writing is more fun when it is something you care about, then assigned the class with a theme no one was interested in. Didn't like her at all.
